resources.string: The moss fits every ache and whispers that enough has been done.
SOFT MOSS FITS EVERY ACHE. ENOUGH HAS BEEN DONE.

The meadow is warm with a holy light. Moss receives the body as if it has studied every burden. Vines hold the weapon gently, not as chains, but as permission to lay it down. A lullaby moves over every scar and names each struggle finished. There is no command here. Only kindness. Rest for one second. Let the eyes close. Let them forget how to open.
WARM MEADOW. SOFT MOSS. VINES HOLD THE WEAPON. THE LULLABY NAMES THE STRUGGLE FINISHED. REST ONE SECOND. EYES CLOSE.
